title: SCMP Cooking
subtitle: Bringing recipe discovery and cooking confidence together
problem_statement: Recipe content was distributed across disconnected pages and lacked clear progression from discovery to cooking.
Users needed a smoother path from inspiration to action, especially on mobile devices in the kitchen context.

transformations.title: Recipe Discovery Redesign
content: Introduced stronger filtering and collection patterns to help users find suitable recipes faster.
Reworked card metadata to emphasize cook time, difficulty, and key ingredients at a glance.

transformations.title: Guided Cooking Experience
content: Redesigned step-by-step mode with clearer pacing, ingredient checkpoints, and persistent progress.
Improved usability for hands-busy scenarios with larger controls and clearer visual states.
